docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, THOMAS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY KNAUF, MITCHELL HOWARD, THOMAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNAUF, MITCHELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, THOMAS $5,118.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,208.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH C.C. 1950 (F) (1) (2) (3). HOWEVER, THE DEFENDANT DID NEED TO REPAIR PART OF THE RUG. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,109.63 FILED BY KNAUF, MITCHELL AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KNAUF, MITCHELL AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, THOMAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF MITCHELL KNAUF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THOMAS HOWARD IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
